final:
module top_module (
	input [3:0] p,
	input [3:0] q,
	output [3:0] out_shift_left,
	output [3:0] out_shift_right);assign out_shift_left = p << 1;
assign out_shift_right = q >> 1;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out_shift_left <= p; out_shift_right <= q;
    end
  end

endmodule
